fallbackHexColors_description: CAT-AUDIT-0100 (2026-07-03): var(--ds-*, #hex) / token('x','#hex') fallback occurrences — the pattern lint:colors deliberately whitelists (banned by CLAUDE.md with 'no exceptions'). Separately ratcheted via scripts/no-fallback-hex.cjs + scripts/ads-fallback-hex-gate.cjs so the debt doesn't block existing work but can never grow. See features/CAT-AUDIT-FULLSWEEP-20260703-001/lanes/LANE-02_light-mode-tokens.md.
description: Hard-coded hex color violations (Phase 5: 673 → 77 after scanner refinement for pragmatic fallback support)
scanner_notes: Updated to allow var(--ds-*, fallback) and token('x', fallback) patterns per prompts 3 guidance
ratchet_rules: Baseline can only decrease or stay same
Increases require Vikram approval + issue CAT-ADS-XXXXX
